sections.paragraph:
with suff. פִּתְחִי, plur. פְּתָחִים, const. פִּתְחֵי, m. an opening, entrance; hence פֶּתַח שַׁעַר הָעִיר at the entrance of the gate of the city, Jos 20:4 Jud. 9:35 compare Pro 1:21. בְּפֶתַח עֵינַיִם in the gate of (the town or village of) Enaim, Gen 38:14. Hence-

(1) a door, of a tent, Gen 18:1 of a house, Gen 19:11, 19 Gen 19:19of the temple, 1Ki 6:8. Acc. פֶּתַת at the door, Gen. locc. citt.; and after verbs of motion, Job 31:34 where also there is פֶּתְחָה Gen 19:6.

(2) the gate of a city, Isa 3:26. Metaph. the gates of the mouth, Pro 8:34 a gate of hope (used of the valley of Achor), Hos 2:17.
